title: Algebra of multi-operators
summary: Defines pointwise zero, addition, subtraction, scalar multiplication, and unary pre- and post-composition for rank-r ambient operators.

mathematicalContent.heading: Pointwise algebra
mathematicalContent.body: Rank-r operators can be combined pointwise as functions of the input tuple and ambient point. These definitions do not assert that the operators are multilinear.

mathematicalContent.heading: Postcomposition
mathematicalContent.body: A unary operator L can be applied after a multi-operator P.

mathematicalContent.heading: Input-side composition
mathematicalContent.body: precompSlot applies L to one selected input before P; precompAll allows a different unary operator in every input slot.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the zero rank-r operator, returning the zero ambient function for every input tuple.
Defines pointwise addition of two rank-r operators.
correspondence.leanType: def multiAdd {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines pointwise subtraction of two rank-r operators.
correspondence.leanType: def multiSub {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines multiplication of a rank-r operator by a real scalar.
correspondence.leanType: def multiSmul {r : ℕ} (c : ℝ) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Applies a unary operator L to the output produced by P.
correspondence.leanType: def postcomp {r : ℕ} (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Applies L to the ith input and then evaluates P on the modified tuple.
correspondence.leanType: def precompSlot {r : ℕ} (i : Fin r) (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Applies the slot-dependent unary operator Lᵢ to every input before evaluating P.
correspondence.leanType: def precompAll {r : ℕ} (L : Fin r → Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) : CalConf.MultiOperator r
theorem multiZero_apply {r : ℕ} (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : CalConf.multiZero r F = zero Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds pointwise addition at an ambient point U.
correspondence.leanType: theorem multiAdd_apply {r : ℕ} (P Q : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : CalConf.multiAdd P Q F U = P F U + Q F U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds scalar multiplication at an ambient point U.
correspondence.leanType: theorem multiSmul_apply {r : ℕ} (c : ℝ) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) (U : Conf.AmbientBundle) : CalConf.multiSmul c P F U = c * P F U

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds postcomposition on a multi-input F.
correspondence.leanType: theorem postcomp_apply {r : ℕ} (L : Function Conf → Function Conf) (P : CalConf.MultiOperator r) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : CalConf.postcomp L P F = L (P F)

references.note: Source for multilinear tangentiality and Laplacian-word constructions.

limitations: These are operations on arbitrary functions MultiInput → Function. The file proves only definitional evaluation identities; it does not establish multilinearity, closure of weight mappings, differential order, tangentiality, or compatibility with the ambient Euler field.
